ITranslatableStringRegistryAdd Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Overload List
  NameDescription
Add(ITranslatableString)
Adds a translatable string to the registry. This information can be analyzed to obtain strings that require localization.
Add(IEnumerableITranslatableString)
